hero.description: Professional photography for events, places, nature, and people. Crafted with cinematic restraint, emotional timing, and premium attention to atmosphere.

heroMedia.title: Golden Bloom
heroMedia.alt: A figure surrounded by warm flowers

featuredCollection.title: Selected Work
featuredCollection.description: A rotating edit of stories with strong mood, texture, and narrative clarity.

about.title: A practice built around atmosphere
about.subtitle: Photographer based in Melbourne, Australia, working across intimate events, thoughtful portraiture, places with personality, and nature-led visual essays.
about.body: I approach photography as visual storytelling: not only documenting what is visible, but translating the feeling of a place, a moment, or a person into something lasting. My work leans toward elegant motion, patient framing, and imagery that feels both polished and human.
about.philosophy: The strongest image is rarely the loudest one. It is the frame that invites you to stay a little longer.
about.portraitAlt: Portrait sample representing Schipor Adrian's style

services.title: Event Coverage
services.description: Refined event storytelling for launches, private celebrations, brand gatherings, and performances.

services.title: Portrait Sessions
services.description: Editorial and personal portrait work with a calm pace, clear direction, and natural expression.

services.title: Places & Nature
services.description: Atmospheric documentation of destinations, architecture, interiors, and outdoor stories.

contact.title: Let's shape the next story
contact.description: Available for commissions, brand collaborations, portrait sessions, destination work, and carefully selected personal projects.
